Home / Services / Foundation Excavation

Foundation Excavation

Expert foundation excavation services for residential and commercial buildings.

A solid foundation starts with precise excavation. Wills Excavating provides expert foundation excavation services for residential and commercial projects across Indianapolis. We understand the importance of accurate measurements, proper depth, and stable soil conditions to ensure a long-lasting foundation. Our team uses advanced equipment and techniques to excavate according to your building plans, taking into account the specific soil composition and drainage requirements of your site. We carefully remove soil, level the base, and prepare the site for concrete pouring or foundation construction.

We also handle backfilling and compaction around the foundation to provide additional support and prevent water infiltration. With years of experience in Indianapolis, we're familiar with the challenges posed by our local soil conditions and implement strategies to mitigate potential problems. Whether you're building a new home in Carmel, a commercial building in Fishers, or an addition in Noblesville, Wills Excavating ensures your foundation is built on a solid, reliable base.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Layout & Marking. Accurately marking the excavation area according to the building plans.
  2. 02 Step 2: Excavation. Removing soil to the required depth and dimensions, ensuring proper slopes.
  3. 03 Step 3: Leveling & Compaction. Leveling the base of the excavation and compacting the soil for stability.
  4. 04 Step 4: Backfilling & Grading. Backfilling around the foundation and grading the surrounding area for drainage.

Benefits

  • Ensures a stable and level foundation
  • Prevents foundation cracks and settling
  • Reduces the risk of water damage
  • Meets all building code requirements

Frequently Asked Questions

How deep do you typically excavate for a foundation?

The depth depends on the building plans and local building codes. We follow the engineer's specifications to ensure the foundation is properly supported.

What type of equipment do you use for foundation excavation?

We use a variety of excavators, backhoes, and skid steers, depending on the size and complexity of the project. All our equipment is well-maintained and operated by experienced professionals.

How do you handle groundwater during excavation?

We can implement dewatering techniques, such as sump pumps or well points, to remove groundwater and keep the excavation site dry.
